providers.label: Qwen3-ASR 0.6B GGUF auto prompt
args: Transcribe the audio. Return only the transcript text.
providers.notes: Baseline prompt used in the public smoke benchmark.

providers.label: Qwen3-ASR 0.6B GGUF forced Hindi prompt
args: The audio language is Hindi. Transcribe the speech in Hindi. Do not translate. Return only the transcript text.
providers.notes: Tests whether a normal English instruction can steer the GGUF/llama.cpp route toward Hindi.

providers.label: Qwen3-ASR 0.6B GGUF Devanagari prompt
args: The audio language is Hindi. Transcribe the speech in Devanagari Hindi. Do not translate into another language. Return only the transcript text.
providers.notes: Tests whether asking for the target script affects the detected language or transcript.

providers.label: Qwen3-ASR 0.6B GGUF Hindi instruction prompt
args: इस ऑडियो को हिंदी में लिखें। केवल प्रतिलेख लौटाएँ।
providers.notes: Tests whether a native Hindi instruction helps the model/runtime follow the intended language.

providers.label: Qwen3-ASR 1.7B GGUF auto prompt
args: Transcribe the audio. Return only the transcript text.
providers.notes: Larger-model control for the same Hindi fixture.

providers.label: Qwen3-ASR 1.7B GGUF forced Hindi prompt
args: The audio language is Hindi. Transcribe the speech in Hindi. Do not translate. Return only the transcript text.
providers.notes: Checks whether the larger GGUF model plus explicit prompt fixes the Hindi failure mode.
